title: HelioChronicles Daily Record
description: One row per calendar day. Columns are union across sources; null when a given source does not cover that date.

date.description: ISO-8601 calendar date, UTC. Primary key.

decimal_year.description: Fractional year at mid-day, copied from SILSO for SSN-era rows.

ssn.description: Daily total sunspot number (SILSO V2.0). Null if no observations that day.

ssn_stddev.description: Daily standard deviation of the individual station SSN values. Null when unavailable.

ssn_nobs.description: Number of stations contributing to the daily SSN.

ssn_definitive.description: True if SILSO marks this value as definitive; false if provisional (subject to revision).

kp_sum.description: Sum of the 8 three-hour Kp values for the day (0.0 to 72.0 in thirds).

ap_daily.description: GFZ Ap daily average (linear ap scale, nT).
